ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "stock_code" TEXT /* Stock code of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the product was added to the inventory */,
  "date_last_modified" TEXT /* Date the product was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping address */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the billing address */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the order */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Shipping cost for the order */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the order */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product being ordered */,
  "price_at_purchase" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of purchase */,
  "discount_applied" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the item */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Shipping cost for the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being paid for */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "amount_paid" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the payment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Refund amount if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being shipped */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date the shipment was made */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping (e.g., ground, air) */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Carrier used for the shipment */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory item */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being inventoried */,
  "quantity_in_stock" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when stock reaches the reorder level */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date of the last reorder */,
  "next_reorder_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of the next reorder */,
  "last_inventory_check_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inventory check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being returned */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being returned */,
  "reason_for_return" TEXT /* Reason for the return (e.g., damaged, wrong item) */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the return was processed */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Refund amount */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of the return */,
  "return_reason_detail" TEXT /* Additional details about the return reason */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
